allow: PowerShell($resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8080/mobile.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $lines = $resp.Content -split "`n"; "Total lineas servidas: $\($lines.Count\)"; "--- Linea 20202 \(1-indexed\): ---"; $lines[20201]; "--- Caracter 44 de esa linea: ---"; if \($lines[20201].Length -ge 44\) { $lines[20201].Substring\(40, [Math]::Min\(20, $lines[20201].Length - 40\)\) } else { "linea solo tiene $\($lines[20201].Length\) caracteres" })

PowerShell($file = Get-Content -LiteralPath "mobile.html"; "--- Lineas 20170-20175 en disco \(lo que el browser ve como 20200-20205 si live-server inyecta 30 lineas arriba\): ---"; for \($i=20169; $i -le 20174; $i++\) { "$\($i+1\): $\($file[$i]\)" })

PowerShell($resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8080/mobile.html" -UseBasicParsing; $servedLines = $resp.Content -split "`n"; $diskLines = Get-Content -LiteralPath "mobile.html"; "Served total: $\($servedLines.Count\)"; "Disk total: $\($diskLines.Count\)"; "--- Buscar 'al inicio del HTML' en ambos: ---"; for\($i=0; $i -lt $servedLines.Count; $i++\) { if \($servedLines[$i] -match 'al inicio del HTML'\) { "Served linea $\($i+1\): $\($servedLines[$i]\)"; break } }; for\($i=0; $i -lt $diskLines.Count; $i++\) { if \($diskLines[$i] -match 'al inicio del HTML'\) { "Disk linea $\($i+1\): $\($diskLines[$i]\)"; break } })

PowerShell($tries=0; $ok=$false; while\($tries -lt 60\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8080/mobile.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $ok=$true; break } } catch {}; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $tries++ }; if \($ok\) { "Total bytes: $\($r.RawContentLength\)"; $diskBytes = \(Get-Item mobile.html\).Length; "Bytes on disk: $diskBytes"; $end = $r.Content.Substring\($r.Content.Length - 100\); "--- Last 100 chars ---"; $end } else { "NOT_READY" })
